identity.name: Yaalon MOROITSU
identity.title: Gentle like Moonlight
identity.summary:
On my free time, I grind Turos and perform fire acrobatics in the forest.
They actually named that ghoulish zone "Ash Forest" after a particularly eventful representation of mine that will never be forgotten.
I can hold deadlines, too.

experience.title: Recruiter & Party Planner
experience.abstract:
Keeping the communication channels busy and entertaining at all times.
Part of the hiring team that discovered the rarest of pearls ever recruited.

experience.title: Intelligence Officer
experience.abstract:
In a secret mission to the Middle-East. Grinded undercover for a while, reporting directly to ██████ ████████.
Single-handedly overturned plots from the ███████████ government.
Brought the ████████████ ██ ██████ conspiracy to light.

experience.title: Interior Designer
experience.abstract:
Designed and promoted our most prominent display home to date.
Project highlighted by the Calpheon Metropolis Magazine as a prime example of contemporary interior design trends.

experience.title: Ninja (Contractor job)
experience.abstract:
Tried my hands at a less-irrelevant class.
Turns out Musa is just right for me.

experience.title: Industrial Magnate
experience.abstract:
Establised a sprawling worker empire that directly impacts the global Marketplace.
Set up precise protocols so that this corporation practically runs itself.

experience.title: Horse Breeder
experience.abstract:
Lovingly cared for our most magnificient animals.
Proud father of a mythical Diné and his little Arduanatt sister.

experience.title: Competitive Hunter
experience.abstract: Reached First Place at the 277 Olympic Games in both Whale and Khalk categories.

education.highlight:
Learned to appreciate the most delicate flora of our world.
Graduated top of my class.
Focused primarily on refining recipes to elevate Pickled Vegetables to the status of delicacy.

Trained in Weapon Enchanting by the Black Spirit, the most famous university lecturer in all Blackstone matters.
Degree obtained after a decade of practice.

endorsments.title: Duvencrunian Statue
endorsments.excerpt:
[...] a very talented individual, tackling all assignments with dedication.
I highly recommend Yaalon, he is a team player and would make a great asset to any organisation.

endorsments.title: Master Duellist
endorsments.excerpt:
Yaalon showed obvious technical skills and remarkable maternal abilities.
Don't try to poke the bear, 'cause his Crescent Blade pokes back pretty hard.
